title: Kerala polls: UDF began preparations for Mission 2026 a year ago; it will win in State: Satheesan
description: Kerala’s Leader of Opposition V.D. Satheesan says the Congress has brought back 90% of the social groups that left the UDF; he says the LDF government has put the State in a “huge debt trap” and has “failed in the health, education, agriculture and welfare sectors” due to which there is a current against the government
